creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
I've made a successful port of 1.15.5. However there are some issues that need to be addressed.

Due to it being the last of the 1.x series it depends on some versions of packages that are no longer available in the port tree, and without these versions it will error due to API changes. The packages are:

google-cloud-cpp == 1.17.0
grcp = 1.22.0,1

Will need to address this.
